stemHtml:
Refer to figure or ALICANTE - chart 10-3C from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. 
An aircraft is following a departure route with the following constraints: minimum altitude at D9.5 ALT is 3100 ft; maximum speed during the turn onto radial 246 from ALT is 220 kt; and the Minimum Sector Altitude (MSA) between D9.5 ALT and D6.3 ALT is 5900 ft. Based on this information, which departure route is being followed, and from which runway is the aircraft departing?
